title: Return By Death from Re: Zero
description: Return by death from Re: Zero with sound effects, it is op but it is meant to be mainly for me and friends. It automatically enables keep inventory, instant respawn and no death messages.
body:
This mod adds return by death from the anime Re: Zero Which allows you to return to where you were around 2 minutes ago when you die, it has no repercussions. This mod also includes sound effects from the Re: Zero anime.

**Features:**

Return by death (on automatically)

**Why would you get this mod?**

If you are a fan of Re: Zero or just want to mess around with friends
